title: antirrhinum orontium var. microcarpum
intro: Antirrhinum orontium var. microcarpum, also known as the small-flowered snapdragon or small-flowered dragon flower, is a species of flowering plant in the snapdragon family. Historically, this plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Antirrhinum orontium var. microcarpum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential applications.
